titleStmt.title: SII 11.42: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 42. (B.K. No. 1 of 1927-28). SAVAḌI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE LEANING AGAINST THE FRONT WALL OF THE VILLAGE-chāvaḍi.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Koṭṭigadēva and is dated in Śaka 892 corresponding to the cyclic year Pramōdūta (= A.D. 970). It mentions the king's subordinate-Mārasiṅgha-Permānaḍi who was governing over Kisukāḍu Seventy and records the construction of a temple and a maṇḍapa and the installation of a liṅga and the goddess Bhagavatī therein, by Gaṅgara Vatsayya and states that Suṅkada Ballayya granted twelve mattar of land to the temple and two mattar to its manager (sthānapati). The charity of Beṅgi Gaḻdugarayya, son of Ballayya, called also Balavarman, is extolled. The record was composed by poet Nāraṇa and engraved by Nāganārya.
The English equivalent of the date quoted would be probably A.D. 971, February 15, Wednesday. The week day cited in the record is evidently a mistake.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . koṭṭigadēva śrīpṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭārakara
vijayarājya muttarōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānaṁ sale tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷa
ppa mārasiṅgha permmānaḍigaḷ kisukāḍeḻpattuvanāḷe
© svasti śrīmatsakanṛpa
kaḷātītasaṁvatsara
śataṁgaḷ 892 ne
ya pramōdōtha saṁva
tsaraṁ pravarttise tadva
riṣābhyantara phālguṇa
bahuḷa 2 ge sukravā
radaṁdu gaṅgara vatsayyaṁ
svabhuliṅgapratiṣṭheyaṁ
geydu dēgulamaṁ vāma(ṁ)ṇḍapamaṁ satti
riya magaṁ koṇḍa ya
varyyaṁtāditya gu
mattaḷi yōcināyakanu bhagavatiyumaṁ
pratiṣṭhegeydu māḍisi maṭa
vaṁ māḍisidōṁ suṅkada ballayyaṁ dēgulakke ko
ṭṭa panneraḍu mattarukeyyuva sthānapati gera
ḍu mattaru biṭṭu māḍisida keyyaniva salu
va gadyāṇa veṇṭu koṭṭu biḍisidōṁ peṟe
rmmattaru keyya koṭṭa nantu padinā
lmattaru maṁ dharmmamaṁ balla Ī maryyādeya naḻidava reḻkōṭiyuvaṁThe letters ttaru are written below the line.
vāraṇāsiyuvaṁ kavileyuma naṟida doṣama neyduvar © svadattaṁ para(da)
dattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundhari . ṣaṣṭhi variṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
kṛmi . balavarmmaṁ tande tāysale praguḷeyabbe kulavadhu tanage yaraga
bbeyene peṁpu sale sati dharege gaḻdugana . vārinidhivaḷayaparivṛtadhāri
ṇi nilvinega muḍupakarigaṇatatiyuṁ tārakeyuḷḷina mirkkiṁtōraṁti
ra beṁgi gaḻdugarayyana dharmmaṁ . jalanidhivēṣṭhitadharaṇī tala
kulācala di diggajāvaliyiṁ mahītalamaṁ tāḷdida nāgarakula
muḷḷinaṁ beṅgigaḻdugarayyana dharmmaṁ . vēdavēdāṅga manōda
de sāstrama nādimadhyāṁta maṟiyade nāraṇaṅgādudu kavite
sahajamē . nāganāryyana śrīghralikhitaṁ . maṅgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.42 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
